title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 53.077 - Additional duty (certain first class counties)
text:
53.077.  Additional duty (certain first class counties). — In addition to the other duties prescribed by law, in all counties of the first class not having a charter form of government, the assessor shall annually submit a list of all new assessments made during the year within any city all or part of which is within the county.
(L. 1978 S.B. 775 § 53.075)
